'''Lokk Gimble''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Ugnaught/Legends|Ugnaught]] who worked for [[Sebolto]] during the waning years of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]]. He earned a [[Bounty/Legends|bounty]] on his head by the [[Corporate Alliance/Legends|Corporate Alliance]] for stealing a chemical process and adapted this technology for the production of [[Death stick/Legends|death sticks]] laced with the deadly neurotoxin. The bounty was claimed by [[Jango Fett/Legends|Jango Fett]] who caught Gimble and his accomplice "Rachet" [[Gramzee]] on [[Malastare/Legends|Malastare]].<ref name="BH" />

==Behind the scenes==
In ''[[Star Wars: Bounty Hunter]]'', Lokk Gimble's bounty was 4,000 [[Galactic Credit Standard/Legends|credits]] alive and 2,000 credits [[Death/Legends|dead]].<ref name="BH" />
